privileged_info_summary: The task applies horizontal shear transformation with 50-pixel magnitude using OpenCV's affine transformation matrix [[1, shear_factor, 0], [0, 1, 0]]. Test image is downloaded from Unsplash (800x533 JPEG). Verification requires SSIM ≥ 0.85 similarity with reference and width increase of 20-100 pixels. Shear correctly increases image width to 850px while preserving 533px height. Pass threshold is 75% (3/4 criteria). Primary Unsplash URL is accessible; fallback URL returns 404 error.
